description:
Convert 2 functions to single-line do: syntax

1. expired?/2 (line 18-21):
```elixir
def expired?(%{expires_at: exp}, opts), do: Keyword.get(opts, :now, System.system_time(:millisecond)) >= exp
```

2. remaining_ms/2 (line 34-37):
```elixir
def remaining_ms(%{expires_at: exp}, opts), do: max(0, exp - Keyword.get(opts, :now, System.system_time(:millisecond)))
```

File: apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/expirable.ex
title: Convert expirable.ex to do: syntax
